supply_chain.dependencies: The Company depends heavily on ability to purchase quality merchandise in sufficient quantities at competitive prices. Large volumes demanded may not be consistently available, particularly for certain food items. The Company buys from numerous domestic and foreign suppliers and importers.
supply_chain.risks: Suppliers subject to risks including labor disputes, union organizing activities, human and animal rights violations, financial liquidity, climate change, natural disasters, extreme weather conditions, environmental degradation, public health emergencies, supply constraints. Failure of suppliers to adhere to quality control, packaging, legal, regulatory, labor, human rights, environmental or animal welfare standards. Trade-related actions in various countries, particularly China and the United States, have affected costs of merchandise. Higher tariffs could adversely impact results.

regulatory_risks: Local land use and other regulations restricting construction and operation of warehouses and depots
Local community actions opposed to warehouse locations
Local laws restricting operations
Environmental regulations
Fuel economy standards and regulations related to climate change
Government regulations limiting carbon dioxide and other greenhouse gas emissions
Compliance with environmental, health and safety standards
Payment Card Industry Data Security Standards and data security rules
Electronic funds transfers rules and regulations
Product safety laws and labeling standards
Value added, sales-based, payroll, product, import or other non-income taxes
Changes in tax rates, new U.S. or foreign tax legislation
Transfer pricing disputes
ESG regulations including disclosure and compliance requirements
Wastewater and stormwater treatment and disposal regulations
Refrigeration systems regulations including ammonia-based chillers
OECD Pillar 2 global minimum corporate tax of 15%

Privacy and data protection regulations globally (European Union General Data Protection Regulation, California Consumer Privacy Act, Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act, China's Personal Information Protection Act)
Evolving rules concerning artificial intelligence
Federal Insecticide, Fungicide and Rodenticide Act (FIFRA) compliance
FDA approval requirements
Jurisdictions enacted or proposed laws restricting operation or expansion of large retailers and warehouse clubs

sanction_risks: Trade-related actions in various countries, particularly China and the United States affecting merchandise costs
Tariffs and trade sanctions impacting supply chain
Foreign trade restrictions and trade sanctions
